title: 东方: 月兔狂想曲
description:
《RHAPSODY OF MOON RABBIT》It is a dual-protagonist top-down action shooting game where you will control the combination of Reisen and Youmu, one focusing on offense and the other on defense, to defeat powerful enemies. Compared to traditional Eastern "STG" games, as long as one character survives, the other will respawn within ten seconds, making the difficulty relatively lower. 

• The game supports keyboard and mouse operation by default 

• The human's moon landing mission was thwarted by the Moon Rabbit Team. The victorious Moon Rabbit Team pursued to completely destroy the human's rocket launch base, but was defeated by Dr. Okazaki's android. Only one Moon Rabbit managed to escape, unable to return to the lunatic kingdom, she sought help at the Yagokoro Eirin in Gensokyo. Under the command of Yagokoro Eirin, the retired Moon Rabbit veteran returned to the battlefield, along with Youmu Konpaku, to save their comrades captured by humans. During their adventure, they gradually encountered the terrifying dark side of the human world, as well as the shocking conspiracy of the genius scientist, Dr. Okazaki Yumemi.

• Here is a refreshing third-person perspective shooting game

• There is also a strong sense of impact in close combat

• It can even be bounced back
description_short: Rhapsody of the Moon Rabbit is a second player game in Valkyrie Studio. You will operate Reisen Udongein Inaba and Youmu Konpaku,smash the plot of the scientific eccentric.
